# CryptoRenta
> Free, private cryptocurrency tax calculator for Spanish IRPF

Comprehensive FIFO-based crypto tax calculator. 100% client-side zero-knowledge architecture. No registration, no server, no tracking. Open source alternative to Koinly and Cointracker for Spanish taxpayers.

## Docs
- Home: https://cryptorenta.app
- Calculator: https://cryptorenta.app/calculadora
- How to export CSVs: https://cryptorenta.app/guia

## Features
- Upload exchange CSVs (Coinbase supported, Binance & Kraken coming soon)
- Automatic FIFO calculation compliant with Spanish AEAT tax law
- Classification into IRPF boxes: Box 1 (Capital Gains 1800-1814), Box 2 (Staking 0027), Box 3 (Airdrops 0304+)
- Zero-knowledge: all data processed locally in your browser
- Download per-asset breakdown for Renta Web entry
- Multi-year support

## Optional
- GitHub: https://github.com/jpradanos00/crypto-renta
- Contribute a parser: https://github.com/jpradanos00/crypto-renta#contribuir
